blocks.text: ♟️ 18:45 — Carlsen opens Grenke Freestyle Chess campaign, Round 1 in Karlsruhe
Barcelona lead La Liga by 4 points but the Metropolitano is no place for complacency. Atlético need a win to keep any title ambitions alive — expect intensity.
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Monte-Carlo Masters opens, clay season's first elite test begins
🎮 Mon 02:00 — PGL CS2 Major Bucharest kicks off; Norwegian rain (Håvard Nygaard) on the big stage
